title: Benevo Pawtato Blueberry Sticks,120g - 3 Pack
features: Natural Sweet Potato Dog Chews | Pawtato's plant-based dog treats are based on nutritious sweet potato, a true superfood, blended with rice and fused with blueberry to produce this pack of vegan dog chews.

Hypoallergenic Dog Treats | Our dog chews are ideal for dogs with a sensitive stomach. They are free from meat, wheat, dairy, eggs, artificial colour and flavours. No hide from any animal, a great rawhide alternative.

Puppy Chews From 16 Weeks | Pawtato dog treats can be given to puppies, however we recommend they are over 16 weeks old and under supervision the entire time. We don't recommend them for younger and smaller puppies. Ideal dog treats for small dogs
Low Fat Dog Treats | All the Pawtato dog treats typically have 1% or less fat content.
This pack contains 8 veggie chew sticks formulated with no hide from any animal. Ethical and cruelty-free.
description: Product description Vegan approved dog treats - 100% plant based Our plant-based dog treats are certified vegan by both the Vegan Society and Vegetarian Society UK. We even won a best treat award from PETA! As a meat-free alternative to rawhide chews, our range is free from meat, dairy, egg and any industrial animal by-products (like rawhide) and derivatives. Ingredients Sweet Potato Flour (48%), Corn Starch, Rice Flour (25%), Vegetable Glycerin, Blueberry (0.8%), Potassium Sorbate. Analytical Constituents: Crude protein 3%, Crude fat 0.5%, Crude Fibre 1%, Crude Ash 2.5% Directions Serve as a treat for dogs See more
